posts.author: ArkServices (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: As a pro plan user, I’m constantly running up against my 25,000 automation limit, but the jump from Pro to Enterprise is a 50% increase in price when I don’t need 250,000 automations, more like 30,000. I would like to be able to purchase automation credits in bundles of 5,000.
